ucs.title: [LLM] Chimera 'Skeleton Key' DC authentication patching via Mimikatz on domain controllers (Operation Skeleton Key)
ucs.description: Hunts for the signature Chimera tradecraft documented by CyCraft and NCC Group: injecting Mimikatz into LSASS on a Domain Controller to install a skeleton-key master password, alongside the NTDS.dit theft pattern (vssadmin/ntdsutil 'IFM') Chimera staged before the patch. This pair is what defines G0114's intrusions against Taiwanese semiconductor and APAC airline targets.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.dest_category="domain_controller" OR Processes.dest="*DC*") AND ((Processes.process="*misc::skeleton*" OR Processes.process="*sekurlsa::logonpasswords*" OR Processes.process="*lsadump::lsa*/patch*" OR Processes.process="*lsadump::dcsync*") OR (Processes.process_name="ntdsutil.exe" AND Processes.process="*ifm*" AND Processes.process="*create full*") OR (Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*create shadow*" AND Processes.process="*systemroot*") OR (Processes.process_name="rundll32.exe" AND Processes.process="*comsvcs.dll*" AND Processes.process="*MiniDump*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where user!="*$" | sort 0 - lastTime
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 30d;
let DCs = DeviceInfo
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where OSPlatform startswith "WindowsServer"
    | where DeviceName has_any ("DC","-AD-","PDC","BDC") or RegistryDeviceTag has "DomainController"
    | summarize by DeviceId;
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where DeviceId in (DCs)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where
    // Skeleton-key / LSASS credential patching indicators (Mimikatz commands)
    (ProcessCommandLine has_any ("misc::skeleton","sekurlsa::logonpasswords",
                                 "sekurlsa::pth","lsadump::dcsync","lsadump::lsa /patch"))
    // NTDS.dit theft via ntdsutil IFM (Chimera-documented)
    or (FileName =~ "ntdsutil.exe"
        and ProcessCommandLine has "ifm"
        and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("create full","create rodc"))
    // VSS shadow against system volume to stage NTDS extraction
    or (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe"
        and ProcessCommandLine has "create shadow"
        and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("\\systemroot","C:\\","\\windows"))
    // LSASS minidump via comsvcs.dll (Chimera + Cobalt Strike standard)
    or (FileName =~ "rundll32.exe"
        and ProcessCommandLine has "comsvcs.dll"
        and ProcessCommandLine has "MiniDump")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain,
          FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          IsRemoteSession = InitiatingProcessLogonId,
          SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 30d;
let DCs = DeviceInfo
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where OSPlatform startswith "WindowsServer"
    | where DeviceName has_any ("DC","-AD-","PDC","BDC") or RegistryDeviceTag has "DomainController"
    | summarize by DeviceName;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Computer in (DCs) or Computer has_any ("DC","-AD-")
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where
    (CommandLine has_any ("misc::skeleton","sekurlsa::logonpasswords",
                          "sekurlsa::pth","lsadump::dcsync","lsadump::lsa /patch"))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "\\ntdsutil.exe"
        and CommandLine has "ifm"
        and CommandLine has_any ("create full","create rodc"))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "\\vssadmin.exe"
        and CommandLine has "create shadow"
        and CommandLine has_any ("\\systemroot","C:\\","\\windows"))
    or (NewProcessName endswith "\\rundll32.exe"
        and CommandLine has "comsvcs.dll"
        and CommandLine has "MiniDump")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType, SubjectUserName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Chimera Skeleton-Key / NTDS.dit Theft Indicators on Domain Controller
id: 7c0a1f64-3e7b-4a84-9f1f-chimera-g0114-skeleton
status: experimental
description: Detects Mimikatz skeleton-key, DCSync, ntdsutil IFM, VSS-of-system, or comsvcs.dll LSASS minidump on a DC \u2014 the credential-access chain attributed to Chimera (G0114) by CyCraft and NCC Group.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0114/
  - https://research.nccgroup.com/2021/01/06/abusing-cloud-services-to-fly-under-the-radar/
  - https://www.cycraft.com/download/CyCraftAPT10_Chimera_April2020.pdf
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/05
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_mimikatz_kw:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'misc::skeleton'
      - 'sekurlsa::logonpasswords'
      - 'sekurlsa::pth'
      - 'lsadump::dcsync'
      - 'lsadump::lsa /patch'
  selection_ntdsutil_ifm:
    Image|endswith: '\ntdsutil.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'ifm'
      - 'create '
  selection_vssadmin:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'create shadow'
      - '\\?\GLOBALROOT'
  selection_comsvcs:
    Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'comsvcs.dll'
      - 'MiniDump'
  filter_machine_account:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_mimikatz_kw or selection_ntdsutil_ifm or selection_vssadmin or selection_comsvcs) and not filter_machine_account
fields:
  - Computer
  - User
  - Image
  - CommandLine
  - ParentImage
falsepositives:
  - Authorised AD recovery / DR drills using ntdsutil IFM (rare, scheduled)
  - Backup vendors invoking vssadmin against the system volume (whitelist by SHA / parent path)
level: critical
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.003
  - attack.t1556.001
  - attack.g0114
ucs.rationale: Chimera (CyCraft / NCC Group 'Operation Skeleton Key') is uniquely characterised by patching LSASS on the domain controller with Mimikatz `misc::skeleton`, then exfiltrating NTDS.dit via `ntdsutil ifm` and a VSS snapshot of the system volume \u2014 the same chain attributed to no other major China-nexus cluster at the same fidelity. Scoping to DCs eliminates 99% of the noise from generic Mimikatz
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Chimera staged exfiltration — 7-Zip multipart archive on a DC/file share followed by cloud-storage egress
ucs.description: Hunts Chimera's documented exfil pattern: collected data is archived with 7-Zip into password-protected multi-part .zip/.7z volumes (often `-v300m -p<pwd>`) staged in `C:\Users\Public\` or `C:\PerfLogs\`, then uploaded to OneDrive / Dropbox / Mega within hours. Both halves are individually noisy but the *time-bound chain on the same host* is near-zero in benign telemetry.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as ArchiveTime values(Processes.process) as ArchiveCmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name IN ("7z.exe","7za.exe","WinRAR.exe","Rar.exe")) AND Processes.process="*a *" AND (Processes.process="*-p*" OR Processes.process="*-v*" OR Processes.process="*-mx*") AND (Processes.process="*\\Public\\*" OR Processes.process="*\\PerfLogs\\*" OR Processes.process="*\\ProgramData\\*" OR Processes.process="*\\$Recycle.Bin*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename dest as DeviceName | join type=inner DeviceName [| tstats summariesonly=t count values(All_Traffic.dest) as ExfilHost values(All_Traffic.app) as ExfilApp min(_time) as ExfilTime from datamodel=Network_Traffic where All_Traffic.dest IN ("*onedrive.live.com","*1drv.ms","*dropbox.com","*api.dropboxapi.com","*content.dropboxapi.com","*mega.nz","*mega.co.nz","*drive.google.com","*googleapis.com","*gofile.io","*mediafire.com","*wetransfer.com","*s3.amazonaws.com","*pcloud.com","*box.com") AND All_Traffic.bytes_out>5000000 by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | rename src as DeviceName] | where ExfilTime>=ArchiveTime AND ExfilTime<=ArchiveTime+21600 | eval DelayMinutes=round((ExfilTime-ArchiveTime)/60,1) | table DeviceName user ArchiveCmd ArchiveTime ExfilHost ExfilApp ExfilTime DelayMinutes parent_process_name | sort 0 - ExfilTime
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let StageWindow = 6h;
let StagingDirs = dynamic([@"\Users\Public\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\ProgramData\",
                          @"\$Recycle.Bin\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\Intel\Logs\"]);
let CloudHosts = dynamic(["onedrive.live.com","1drv.ms","sharepoint.com",
                          "dropbox.com","dropboxapi.com","dropboxusercontent.com",
                          "mega.nz","mega.co.nz","userapi.mega.co.nz",
                          "drive.google.com","docs.google.com","googleusercontent.com",
                          "gofile.io","mediafire.com","wetransfer.com",
                          "pcloud.com","box.com","s3.amazonaws.com"]);
let Archives = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ ("7z.exe","7za.exe","WinRAR.exe","Rar.exe")
    | where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\s+a(\s|\.)"          // archive-add verb
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("-p","-mx","-v","-r ","-mhe=on")  // pwd / split / encrypt-headers
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (StagingDirs)
    | project ArchiveTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              ArchiveCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
              ArchiveParent = InitiatingProcessFileName;
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where RemoteUrl has_any (CloudHosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (
    "powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe",
    "wmic.exe","rclone.exe","megacmd.exe","megasync.exe","7z.exe")
| join kind=inner Archives on DeviceId
| where Timestamp between (ArchiveTime .. ArchiveTime + StageWindow)
| project ArchiveTime, ExfilTime = Timestamp,
          DelayMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', Timestamp, ArchiveTime),
          DeviceName, AccountName,
          ArchiveParent, ArchiveCmd,
          ExfilProc = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ExfilCmd  = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          RemoteUrl, RemoteIP, RemotePort
| order by ExfilTime desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let StageWindow = 6h;
let StagingDirs = dynamic([@"\Users\Public\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\ProgramData\",
                          @"\$Recycle.Bin\", @"\Windows\Temp\"]);
let CloudHosts = dynamic(["onedrive.live.com","1drv.ms","sharepoint.com",
                          "dropbox.com","dropboxapi.com","mega.nz","mega.co.nz",
                          "drive.google.com","docs.google.com","googleusercontent.com",
                          "gofile.io","mediafire.com","wetransfer.com",
                          "pcloud.com","box.com","s3.amazonaws.com"]);
let Archives = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\7z.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith "\\7za.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith "\\WinRAR.exe"
         or NewProcessName endswith "\\Rar.exe"
    | where CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\s+a(\s|\.)"
    | where CommandLine has_any ("-p","-mx","-v","-r ","-mhe=on")
    | where CommandLine has_any (StagingDirs)
    | project ArchiveTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
              ArchiveCmd = CommandLine,
              ArchiveParent = ParentProcessName;
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
| where DstHostname has_any (CloudHosts) or Url has_any (CloudHosts)
| where ActingProcessName in~ (
    "powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","curl.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe",
    "wmic.exe","rclone.exe","megacmd.exe","megasync.exe","7z.exe")
| join kind=inner Archives on $left.DvcHostname == $right.Computer
| where TimeGenerated between (ArchiveTime .. ArchiveTime + StageWindow)
| project ArchiveTime, ExfilTime = TimeGenerated,
          DelayMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', TimeGenerated, ArchiveTime),
          Computer, Account,
          ArchiveParent, ArchiveCmd,
          ExfilProc = ActingProcessName,
          DstHostname, DstIpAddr, Url, NetworkBytes
| order by ExfilTime desc
ucs.rationale: NCC Group's reverse-engineering of Chimera intrusions in semiconductor and aviation networks documented this exact sequence verbatim: 7-Zip with split-volume + password flags, staged under `C:\Users\Public\` or `C:\PerfLogs\`, then exfiltrated to attacker-controlled OneDrive/Dropbox accounts within hours. Singular 7-Zip use is benign; cloud-storage POSTs are benign; but the same host doing both in

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession, SecurityEvent; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
